assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states '24-month support lifecycle (vs 14 months for Regular)' in the benefits section

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: The response does not mention any cost implications or that Extended channel has additional fees

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: While the response mentions Extended lags behind Regular by 4-6 months, it doesn't clearly explain that Extended gets the same versions but keeps them available longer

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Delayed access to new features - typically 4-6 months behind Regular' as a drawback, addressing the concern about missing features

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides specific gcloud commands for switching both control plane and node pools to extended channel

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Extended channel doesn't support 1.31 yet' and provides command to check available Extended versions

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Compliance-friendly - longer support windows help with regulatory requirements' and 'Better for production stability'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: While the response mentions 24-month support, it doesn't explicitly warn that upgrades are still required within that timeframe

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: The response does not mention that minor version upgrades are manual on Extended channel or that customers must initiate them
